title: Junior Manager Marketing Operations Global E-Commerce
description:
SPEED & SPIRIT is what we look for in our candidates, defined by some simple values that inspire us to BE DRIVEN in our performance, BE VIBRANT in our sporting legacy, BE TOGETHER in our team spirit, and BE YOU to let our individual talent and experience shine. Applying for a job at PUMA is easy and all genders are welcome. Simply click APPLY ONLINE and follow the steps to upload your application.

YOUR MISSION:

As Jr. Manager Marketing Operations Global eCom , you are the connective tissue of the Digital Marketing team. Formally reporting to the Director of Global eCommerce Acquisition & Retention, in practice you will work shoulder-to-shoulder with the Global CS Manager, supporting Customer Service & Operations while serving as the team's central project management resource across all disciplines.

This role is built for someone who is sharply intelligent, impeccably organised, and genuinely energised by making complex things run smoothly. You thrive in fast-moving environments, love structure, and take pride in keeping cross-functional workstreams on track. You are equally comfortable supporting a single team and driving a programme across five.


Act as the right hand to the Global CS Manager, supporting the operational management of the vendor partnership and internal CS workflows 
Track CS performance metrics and consolidate into regular reporting for leadership 
Help coordinate operational reviews, QA processes, and process documentation to ensure consistent service quality across markets 
Support onboarding and briefing of CS agents on new product launches, campaign periods, and policy changes 
Manage the operational calendar for CS: peak trading readiness, staffing plans, and communication schedules 
Project management across the Digital Marketing Team 
Leveraging your visibility across the full team, you will support project management for cross-functional initiatives. Based on the team's current workstreams, you will work across projects in MarTech, SEO, CRM, Paid media & affiliate marketing, 
Maintain the ASANA master project dashboards giving the team real-time visibility into all active initiatives 
Run weekly team syncs: prepare agendas, capture actions, and follow up on open items 
Document processes and build SOPs where repeatable workflows can be standardised.


YOUR TALENT:


Exceptionally organized with a natural systems-thinking mindset 
Academically strong: a degree from a leading university in Business, Management, Operations, Marketing, or a related discipline 
1+ years of experience in a project management, operations, or coordination role, ideally within eCommerce, digital marketing, or a fast-paced global organization 
Proficiency with project management tools (e.g. Asana, Notion, Monday.com, Jira, or equivalent) 
Confident working with data and analytical systems: able to build reporting dashboards, track KPIs, and translate numbers into clear summaries for leadership 
High emotional intelligence: you manage upward and sideways with ease, build trust quickly, and communicate clearly in both written and verbal form 
Commercially curious: you understand the 'why' behind each team's work and use that context to prioritize and problem-solve 
Proactive: you anticipate what's coming and prepare the team before issues arise 
Fluent in English; additional European languages are a plus 
Comfortable working across multiple time zones and cultures in a matrixed, global organization.


PUMA supports over 21,000 employees across 120+ countries. The PUMA Group owns the brand PUMA, Cobra Golf and stichd, and is headquartered in Herzogenaurach, Germany.

PUMA provides equal opportunities for all job applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, or disability. Equality for all is one of the core principles at PUMA and we do not tolerate any form of harassment or discrimination.
